theatres.title: Evil Dead Burn
theatres.review: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…
theatres.fullReview: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
theatres.take: Reviews are all over the map on this one.

theatres.title: Moana
theatres.review: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

similar.title: The Pirates! In an Adventure with Scientists!

theatres.fullReview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
theatres.take: The reviews refuse to agree on this one.

theatres.title: Dhamaal 4
theatres.review: The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.
theatres.fullReview: The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

theatres.title: Lenin
theatres.review: Young, urban-raised Lenin's peaceful romance with Bharathi inadvertently sparks a violent, large-scale village conflict.
theatres.fullReview: Young, urban-raised Lenin's peaceful romance with Bharathi inadvertently sparks a violent, large-scale village conflict.

theatres.title: Alpha
theatres.review: When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen…
theatres.fullReview: When Sita, a highly trained assassin raised in isolation as a super-soldier by a rogue commander, discovers the dark truth about her family and her stolen childhood, she teams up with her long lost sister to take down her creator and his illicit military program.
theatres.take: Reviewers praised the action but flagged the writing.

theatres.title: Idhayam Murali
theatres.review: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply…
theatres.fullReview: A young man navigates the complexities of unrequited love, finding that even as years pass and life takes unexpected turns, certain emotions remain deeply embedded in his heart.
theatres.take: Critics are split — praise for the performances and humour, pushback on the action.

theatres.title: Supergirl
theatres.review: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

similar.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
Rebel Moon - Part One: A Child of Fire
Rebel Moon - Part Two: The Scargiver

theatres.fullReview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.
theatres.take: Critics are split, with the story drawing most complaints.

ott.title: Pritam and Pedro
ott.review: The dynamic between the two contrasting personalities, a seasoned cop who prefers old-school methods and a tech-savvy cop who relies on modern technology for…
ott.fullReview: The dynamic between the two contrasting personalities, a seasoned cop who prefers old-school methods and a tech-savvy cop who relies on modern technology for investigations, as they navigate their partnership in solving crimes.

ott.title: Super Subbu
ott.review: An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?
ott.fullReview: An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

ott.title: Lingam
ott.review: Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.
ott.fullReview: Framed for a crime he didn't commit, a kabaddi hero gets pushed into a world he never wanted and ultimately becomes a feared name.

ott.title: Enola Holmes 3
ott.review: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

similar.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows

ott.fullReview: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.
ott.take: The reviews refuse to agree on this one.

ott.title: House of the Dragon
ott.review: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.
ott.fullReview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.
ott.take: Reviewers found plenty to like here.

ott.title: Silo
ott.review: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

similar.title: The Man in the High Castle

ott.fullReview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
ott.take: Critics liked it, especially the performances and production design.

ott.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
ott.review: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

similar.title: The Aristocrat's Otherworldly Adventure: Serving Gods Who Go Too Far
KamiKatsu: Working for God in a Godless World
I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability

ott.fullReview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. Armed with new friends, some freshly acquired magical abilities, and the courage to do the things he's always dreamed of, he's embarking on an epic adventure—with all of his past experience intact!

ott.title: The Bear
ott.review: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…
ott.fullReview: Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a rough-around-the-edges crew that ultimately reveal themselves as his chosen family.
ott.take: Reviewers were close to unanimous — this one landed.

ott.title: Alliance
ott.review: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.
ott.fullReview: A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare. Sixteen celebrities are split into four teams, battling through physical and mental challenges to earn points-the only currency inside a mysterious HQ run by the System. Face the Ace's power, survive weekly votes, and rebuild alliances every reset.

ott.title: X-Men '97
ott.review: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…
ott.fullReview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.
ott.take: Critics loved it — special praise for the writing and action.

comingSoon.title: Jana Nayagan
comingSoon.review: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before.
comingSoon.fullReview: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.

comingSoon.title: Rising Embers
comingSoon.review: Two thousand years. One truth. Carried by ordinary people who refused to let their faith be silenced.

similar.title: The Messenger: The Story of Joan of Arc

comingSoon.fullReview: Two thousand years. One truth. Carried by ordinary people who refused to let their faith be silenced.

comingSoon.title: The Indian Story
comingSoon.review: A community confronts the devastating impact of pesticide contamination as industrial negligence threatens public…
comingSoon.fullReview: A community confronts the devastating impact of pesticide contamination as industrial negligence threatens public health. The fight for accountability exposes systemic failures in regulatory oversight and corporate responsibility.

comingSoon.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
comingSoon.review: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends…
comingSoon.fullReview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.

comingSoon.title: DC
comingSoon.review: Rebel Devadas joins forces with Chandra in a dangerous world where passion and peril collide.
comingSoon.fullReview: Rebel Devadas joins forces with Chandra in a dangerous world where passion and peril collide. Their turbulent alliance demands bloodshed and tests loyalties as survival becomes the ultimate stakes in their fight.

comingSoon.title: Batwara 1947
comingSoon.review: The story of an elderly Muslim woman who refuses to leave her ancestral home in Lahore, only to have a Hindu refugee…
comingSoon.fullReview: The story of an elderly Muslim woman who refuses to leave her ancestral home in Lahore, only to have a Hindu refugee family from Lucknow allotted to her house following the events of the 1947 Partition of India and Pakistan.

comingSoon.title: Vishwanath & Sons
comingSoon.review: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth.

similar.title: Anne of Green Gables: The Sequel

comingSoon.fullReview: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth. When he comes across a woman named Maddy in her 20s, their dynamic poses many issues that they must come to terms with.

comingSoon.title: Vibe
comingSoon.review: Two inseparable friends' ordinary, unassuming lives spiral into an unpredictable, high-energy adventure that pushes…
comingSoon.fullReview: Two inseparable friends' ordinary, unassuming lives spiral into an unpredictable, high-energy adventure that pushes their survival instincts and friendship to the limit.
